name: Lago
description: An open-source billing API for subscription and usage-based billing in SaaS applications.
longDescription: Lago is an open-source billing API developed in Paris, France, launched in 2021. It is designed for SaaS companies, providing a flexible solution for subscription and usage-based billing. Lago supports real-time billing, invoicing, and payment integrations, with a focus on developer ease and customization. Backed by Y Combinator, Lago has gained traction for its transparency and cost-efficiency, offering an alternative to proprietary billing systems. Its open-source model aligns with European values of digital sovereignty and innovation.
